rulings.Case Title: MOSSER COMPANIES VS. ROBERT GOLDENFLAME et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order Determining Good Faith Settlement And Move-Out Agreement, Its Terms For Stipulation For Entry Of Future Judgment In The Event Of Breach Of The Agreement, And Its Stipulation For Judgment In The Event Of Breach Of The Agreement
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainter Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 20, 2011, line 1. Defendant Robert Goldenflame's Motion for Order Determining Good Faith Settlement is off calendar per request of the moving party. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GOLDEN GATE APARTMENTS VS. PIERRE ISAAC et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainter Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 20, 2011, line 2. Defendant Pierre Isaac's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint is off calendar - moot. Second amended complaint filed with Court's approval. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THE BANK OF NEW YORK VS. SHAUN MICHAEL CROWDER et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainter Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, October 20, 2011, line 3. Defendant Shuan Michael Crowder's Demurrer to Complaint is sustained without leave to amend. Notice fatally defective. = (501/REQ)
